RPC heterogeneous inference on Wi-Fi works and is within 5% of Halo-solo decode. Key trick: -dev RPC0,Vulkan0 (reversed order) pins the 248K-vocab lm_head on the Halo, cutting per-token traffic from 910KB to 55KB (16x less). Best decode 23.0 tok/s at split 25,75; best prefill 35.7 tok/s at split 15,85. Sweep results logged in results_raw.jsonl.
